calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Assignment Order And Order Restraining Judgment Debtor And Order Awarding Attroney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANDREW MANCHON'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ORDER RESTRAINING JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND ORDER AWARDING ATTORNEY FEES. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for assignment order and order restraining judgment debtor from disposing or assigning the right of payment sought is granted. Defendant's motion can be brought prior to judgment and it is not required to domesticate the matter in another state. Defendant's counsel is awarded additional fees in the amount of $740.00 for the filing of this motion. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice And Motion For Assignment Order And Order Restraining Judgment Debtor And Order Awarding Attroney Fees

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ANDREW MANCHON'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ORDER RESTRAINING JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND ORDER AWARDING ATTRONEY FEES.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Continued to June 24, 2011. All parties to provide courtesy copies of their papers to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M.
